findings.location: s3 — サブミット前に処理を追加する
findings.description: The source includes a concrete JSP→HTML output example showing what the custom tag generates: a `<script type="text/javascript">` block containing `nablarch_submit`, and a form with `<input>` whose onclick is set to `return window.nablarch_submit(event, this);`. This illustrates the exact generated HTML structure (including the form/button naming pattern like `nablarch_form1` / `nablarch_form1_1` and the precise onclick attribute value). The knowledge file explains the mechanism conceptually but omits this generated-HTML output example.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains a JSP input block and a corresponding HTML output block under `出力例を以下に示す。`, showing the generated `<script>` tag with `nablarch_submit` function and the resulting `<input onclick="return window.nablarch_submit(event, this);">` element.
